name: Orange Chocolate Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the brown rice syrup and vanilla in a food processor.
2. Process the mixture, adding the tofu in small portions at a time.
3. Add the cocoa powder and grated orange zest to the processor.
4. Incorporate water gradually until the desired consistency is achieved.
5. Pour the mousse into serving dishes and refrigerate.
